tools.name: list_entities
tools.description: List the entities/funds available in this ledger and the periods on file.

tools.name: get_trial_balance
tools.description: Return the trial balance for an entity and period (YYYY-MM).

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Return the prior and current YTD balance for a single GL account.

tools.name: get_gl_positions
tools.description: Return position-level GL balances for a fund (the GL side of a reconciliation).
